quests.description: Visit the demonstration rooms to earn your developer badge.

stages.text: The Guide has information about this facility.
stages.title: Talk to the Guide

stages.text: Enter the yellow portal to see the lighting demo.
stages.title: Visit the Lighting Lab

stages.text: Tell the Guide what you saw.
stages.title: Return to the Guide

quests.title: Tour of the Mesh

quests.description: Clear the cellar of the rat infestation.

stages.text: Kill 5 rats in the cellar.
stages.title: Exterminate Rats

stages.text: Tell the Guard the cellar is clear.

quests.title: Cellar Exterminator

quests.description: Help the field warden restock the outpost.

stages.text: Agree to help FieldWarden, then pick up the crate beside the barn.
stages.title: Collect the Supply Crate

stages.text: Bring the crate back to FieldWarden to finish the errand.
stages.title: Return to FieldWarden

quests.title: Field Supplies

quests.description: Follow the trail to the cabin.

stages.text: Follow the trail and reach the cabin door.
stages.title: Find the Cabin

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Follow the path to the cabin.
quests.title: Prologue: Find the Cabin

quests.description: Search the cabin and light the hearth.

stages.text: Inside the cabin, reach the hearth to finish the prologue.
stages.title: Light the Hearth

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Inside the cabin, light the hearth.
quests.title: Prologue: Light the Hearth

quests.description: Head back outside and return to the trailhead.

stages.text: Leave the cabin and return to the trailhead to finish the prologue.
stages.title: Return to Trailhead

quests.title: Prologue: Return to Trailhead

quests.complete_toast: Prologue: Note found in the cabin.
quests.description: Find a small note tucked away inside the cabin.

stages.text: Explore the cabin and look for a tucked-away note.
stages.title: Find the Note

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Search the cabin for a note.
quests.title: Prologue: Optional Note

quests.description: Choose and clear the upper route beyond the trailhead.

stages.text: Step onto the upper path and push through to the end.
stages.title: Upper Path

quests.title: Act 1: Upper Path

quests.description: Choose and clear the lower route beyond the trailhead.

stages.text: Step onto the lower path and push through to the end.
stages.title: Lower Path

quests.title: Act 1: Lower Path

quests.description: Both routes converge ahead. Press on to the crossroads.

stages.text: Head deeper along the converging trail to the crossroads.
stages.title: Reach the Crossroads

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Routes converge - reach the crossroads.
quests.title: Act 1: Convergence

quests.description: Both routes converge ahead. Press on to the crossroads.

stages.text: Head deeper along the converging trail to the crossroads.
stages.title: Reach the Crossroads

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Routes converge - reach the crossroads.
quests.title: Act 1: Convergence

quests.description: Acknowledge the chosen route at the convergence point.

stages.text: Upper route confirmed.
stages.title: Upper Route

quests.title: Act 1: Upper Route Acknowledged

quests.description: Acknowledge the chosen route at the convergence point.

stages.text: Lower route confirmed.
stages.title: Lower Route

quests.title: Act 1: Lower Route Acknowledged

quests.description: Continue onward beyond the convergence point.

stages.text: Reach the handoff point to continue into Act 1.
stages.title: Continue Onward

quests.description: Begin Chapter 1.

stages.text: Step into Chapter 1 and reach the checkpoint.

quests.title: Act 1: Chapter 1

quests.description: Find and activate the switch to unlock the gate.

stages.text: Enter the gate path and activate the switch.

quests.title: Act 1: Unlock the Gate

quests.description: Proceed beyond the gate once it is unlocked.

stages.text: With the gate unlocked, reach the far side of the path.
stages.title: Reach the Far Side

quests.title: Act 1: Pass Through the Gate

quests.description: Step into the clearing beyond the gate and take in the landmark.

stages.text: Enter the clearing and reach the landmark.
stages.title: Reach the Landmark

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Follow the path into the clearing.
quests.title: Act 1: Arrival

quests.description: Take the upper trail and secure the route.

stages.text: Follow the upper trail through the clearing.
stages.title: Upper Trail

quests.title: Act 1: Upper Trail

quests.description: Take the lower trail and secure the route.

stages.text: Follow the lower trail through the clearing.
stages.title: Lower Trail

quests.title: Act 1: Lower Trail

quests.description: Leave the clearing after securing your chosen trail.

stages.text: Reach the exit point beyond the clearing.
stages.title: Exit the Clearing

quests.description: Leave the clearing after securing your chosen trail.

stages.text: Reach the exit point beyond the clearing.
stages.title: Exit the Clearing

quests.title: Act 1: Depart

quests.description: Press onward to the overlook and mark the journey's first steps.

stages.text: Enter the overlook and reach the marker.

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Press onward to the overlook.
quests.title: Act 1: Chapter 1 Complete

quests.description: Begin Chapter 2 beyond the overlook.

stages.text: Enter the Chapter 2 threshold and reach the checkpoint.

quests.description: Find the switch that unlocks the ruined gate.

stages.text: Enter the ruined gate area and activate the switch.
stages.title: Flip the Switch

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Find the switch at the ruined gate.
quests.title: Act 1: Ruined Gate

quests.description: Push through and reach the marker beyond the ruined gate.

stages.text: After unlocking the gate, reach the marker zone.
stages.title: Reach the Marker

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Pass through to the marker.
quests.title: Act 1: Ruined Route

quests.description: Commit to Path A beyond the ruined gate.

stages.text: Enter the Path A zone and reach the marker.
stages.title: Secure Path A

quests.title: Act 1: Chapter 2 Choice A

quests.description: Commit to Path B beyond the ruined gate.

stages.text: Enter the Path B zone and reach the marker.

quests.complete_toast: Act 1: A note reveals a warning.

stages.text: Reach the exit point to continue onward.

stages.text: Enter the Path B zone and reach the marker.
